name: lz-refactor-workspace
description: NON-shipped compile harness + checker battery for the lz-refactor Fowler catalog (FWL-01..FWL-04). Not part of the shipped plugin; the shipped skill stays dependency-free Markdown.

scripts.check: node tools/check-catalog.mjs && node tools/check-kerievsky.mjs && node tools/check-gof.mjs && node tools/check-extra-patterns.mjs && node tools/check-smells.mjs && node tools/check-crossrefs.mjs && node tools/check-principles.mjs && node tools/check-hygiene.mjs && node tools/check-functional.mjs
